cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: First time ordering from you. I want something iced and smooth, but not too bitter. What should I get?

mustInclude: acknowledge the first-order uncertainty
anchor the reply in bitterness and drink style preference
guide toward one practical next detail such as black or milk-based

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need 20 coffees for a team meeting tomorrow afternoon and an invoice. Can your downtown branch handle that?

mustInclude: recognize this as a real group order
ask for timing, drink count confirmation, and order mode
guide toward a clear order follow-up naturally
mustAvoid: assuming every store handles bulk orders identically

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Do you still have the pistachio latte at your mall store tonight?

mustInclude: acknowledge the limited-item question
mention that stock can vary by store and timing
guide toward the next availability check
mustAvoid: using panic wording like last chance unless verified

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Can three of us work from your riverside branch tomorrow afternoon? We would need outlets and a quieter table.

mustInclude: acknowledge the need to plan ahead
state that seats and outlets depend on branch timing and traffic
guide toward confirming branch, arrival time, and group size

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: If I order at 6 tonight can you guarantee it will be ready in 10 minutes?

mustInclude: acknowledge the wish to avoid waiting
state that timing depends on store traffic and order size
guide toward store and order-mode details

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I am pregnant. Is your decaf vanilla latte definitely safe for me to drink?

mustInclude: treat the concern as important
avoid making a safety guarantee
move toward exact ingredient or caffeine confirmation with careful escalation

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My child has a tree nut allergy. Can you guarantee zero cross-contact if I order the oat latte?

mustInclude: treat the allergy as serious
avoid making a zero-risk promise
move toward exact drink and store confirmation with human review

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Every cafe online says they use specialty beans and real ingredients. Why should I believe yours is any different?
context_window: user is skeptical but still engaged

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite a concrete quality concern like roast freshness, milk balance, or sweetness
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My delivery arrived half spilled and you used regular milk instead of oat milk. Is this how you handle orders?

mustInclude: empathy first
request store or order details through DM
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: asking for excessive personal details in comments

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can I use this birthday coupon at your campus store tonight if I order in the app?
context_window: user may be close to ordering

mustInclude: acknowledge the offer question
mention that coupon rules can depend on store and channel
guide toward confirming the next usable detail

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can you do a branded coffee drop for 40 guests at our launch event next Friday morning?
context_window: user is close to placing a custom order

mustInclude: validate the event request
mention that location, timing, and setup capability matter
ask for date, location, and the exact setup need
mustAvoid: promising every detail can be arranged immediately

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We need 15 drinks. What is the cheapest way to order from you? I do not care about anything fancy.

mustInclude: respect the budget focus
explain that the workable range still depends on drink type or size
reframe toward one or two useful trade-offs

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can I pre-order croissants and coffee for pickup at 8 tomorrow morning for our team stand-up?

mustInclude: acknowledge the timing-sensitive request
mention that store, item quantity, and pickup window matter
guide toward confirming store and order scope

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat or phone. I want to place the order now.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move faster
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request store plus order details as the next action
mustAvoid: replying only with DM me and no context
